variants.title: HiFi Filter OE 3015 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-67070
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter OE 3015 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-67070
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OE 3015 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SAKURA SA-67070. Easy to install and replace, the OE 3015 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
